titlestmt.titleproper: Cornell University Department of Natural Resources records21-18-991
titlestmt.author: Compiled by C. Rote

publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2024-01-08 00:01:09 UTC.
profiledesc.langusage: Description is written in: Undetermined, Code for undetermined script script.

change.item: This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.unittitle: Cornell University Department of Natural Resources records

origination.label: Creator
origination.corpname: New York State College of Agriculture and Life Sciences. Department of Natural Resources

did.physdesc: Reports, bulletins, field notes, slides, radio talks, publications, photographs, drawings, and subject files.
did.abstract: Includes annual reports, monthly reports, bulletins, plans of work, field notes, slides of Cornell campus and activities, radio talks, publications, photographs, committee records, drawings, subject files, and other materials of the Cornell University Department of Natural Resources, formerly the Conservation Department.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

defitem.label: EAD encoding:
defitem.item: Ann Hubert, November 2003Evan Fay Earle, February 2008

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Cornell University Department of Natural Resources records, #21-18-991. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

scopecontent.head: Scope and content
scopecontent.p: Includes annual reports, monthly reports, bulletins, plans of work, field notes, slides of Cornell campus and activities, radio talks, publications, photographs, committee records, drawings, subject files, and other materials of the Cornell University Department of Natural Resources, formerly the Conservation Department. Also, 1939 report on land use in Arnot Forest and slides and photographs used in a 1983 master's thesis by Wayne Hartz.

scopecontent.head: Scope and content
scopecontent.p: Photograph album scrapbook documenting the history of the department, its faculty, buildings, students, and activities, including maple syrup production and the Cornell Biological Field Station at Shackelton Point, Bridgeport, N.Y. Includes photographs, newsletters, and articles
